scope: Canonical audited v1 baseline of OSS repository ingress, interception, wire protocols, context stores, central runtime configuration and committed deployment surfaces. Endpoint variants are grouped under their production router or transport boundary; the gate prevents baseline shrink but does not claim automatic discovery of every future file.
non_goals: Individual HTTP endpoints are not separate capabilities; their owning router is the inventory unit.
A green source or unit test is not certification, production deployment, commercial eligibility or external interoperability evidence.
Private repositories, customer overlays and uncommitted infrastructure are outside this OSS inventory.
MCP availability does not imply full-inline interception for every IDE or client.
New surface families require an explicit reviewed baseline update; absence from this v1 list is not proof that arbitrary future files do not exist.

completeness_categories.boundary: Canonical v1 product ingress, interception and request-routing families audited at contract creation; individual routes are grouped by production entrypoint.
completeness_categories.coverage_rule: The named MCP, CLI, hook, shell, proxy, dashboard, gateway, cloud, daemon IPC and LSP baseline IDs cannot shrink without a validator change.
non_goals: No claim that all client applications exercise every path.

completeness_categories.boundary: Canonical v1 wire protocols accepted or emitted by the audited runtime, including the standalone OCLA verifier sidecar.
completeness_categories.coverage_rule: The named provider wire-shape, streaming and WebSocket baseline IDs cannot shrink without a validator change.
non_goals: Protocol parsing does not prove cross-vendor semantic conformance.

completeness_categories.boundary: The canonical context-store baseline is delegated to the independently code-linked context reality map.
completeness_categories.coverage_rule: Reference exactly one canonical store inventory and its executable completeness gate instead of duplicating store rows here.
non_goals: This reference does not upgrade shadow hot paths to enforced runtime adoption.

completeness_categories.boundary: Canonical v1 central configuration roots audited for request routing, security or deployment behavior.
completeness_categories.coverage_rule: Inventory global/project TOML, proxy, dashboard, gateway, cloud and LSP configuration roots.
non_goals: Per-command flags and test-only environment variables are not separate central configs.

completeness_categories.boundary: Canonical v1 installer, service-manager, container, manifest and target deployment surfaces.
completeness_categories.coverage_rule: Inventory local install, daemon services, gateway/cloud containers, delivery contracts and explicit Helm/Terraform/air-gap/test-deployment gaps.
non_goals: A build recipe or hermetic rehearsal is not evidence that production deployment or rollback occurred.

items.boundary: Local MCP client process to LeanCtxServer through the hybrid stdio transport.
non_goals: Does not establish proprietary IDE full-inline interception.

items.boundary: Human or agent process invoking the lean-ctx binary.
non_goals: CLI presence does not prove every subcommand has protocol-level conformance coverage.

items.boundary: Supported agent hook JSON on stdin to fail-open/fail-closed hook handlers.
non_goals: Hook installation does not prove runtime activation in every supported client.

items.boundary: Installed zsh/bash startup hook redirects eligible non-interactive commands to lean-ctx.
non_goals: Interactive human commands and explicit bypass markers remain outside interception.

items.boundary: Loopback HTTP ingress through provider routers to configured upstreams.
non_goals: Integrated routing is not a certified transparent proxy for every provider feature.

items.boundary: Authenticated or explicitly no-auth local dashboard socket.
non_goals: Dashboard projections are not settlement or production monitoring certification.

items.boundary: Gateway proxy, user API, admin API and metrics listeners backed by configured PostgreSQL.
non_goals: No claim of HA, disaster recovery or production deployment.

items.boundary: Axum cloud API router enabled by the cloud binary and environment configuration.
non_goals: No OSS evidence of production SLO, deployment or external certification.

items.boundary: Unix socket or Windows loopback daemon address used by local processes.
non_goals: Local IPC is not a remote multi-node control plane.

items.surface: LSP and JetBrains backend request routing
items.boundary: Tool request to language-specific stdio LSP or discovered JetBrains HTTP backend.
non_goals: Backend selection does not certify all language servers or IDE versions.

items.surface: MCP JSON-RPC over newline or Content-Length framed stdio
items.boundary: Bidirectional rmcp messages on stdin/stdout.
non_goals: No external MCP certification claim.

items.boundary: Production OpenAI-shaped request-body transformer called by the provider handler.
non_goals: Does not claim full OpenAI API surface coverage.

items.boundary: Production Anthropic-shaped request-body transformer called by the provider handler.
non_goals: Does not claim full Anthropic API surface coverage.

items.boundary: Production Gemini-shaped request-body transformer called by the provider handler.
non_goals: Does not claim full Google AI API surface coverage.

items.boundary: Production Responses-shaped request-body transformer called by the provider handler.
non_goals: Does not claim every Responses event type is transformed.

items.boundary: Production decision that selects the no-idle-timeout upstream client for SSE-shaped requests.
non_goals: Streaming survival does not prove semantic parity for every event schema.

items.boundary: Production conversion of accepted local WebSocket create events into upstream Responses bodies.
non_goals: The bridge is not a general bidirectional provider WebSocket proxy.

items.boundary: Production Codex hook denial projected into the client-specific JSON response contract.
non_goals: No claim of identical hook semantics across proprietary clients.

items.boundary: Loopback-only gRPC projection of the public OCLA token and agent envelope verifier.
non_goals: The loopback verifier is not an engine-inline adapter, remote TLS/auth service, independently maintained implementation, certification or G6 evidence.

items.boundary: Delegated canonical v1 component baseline of context stores, identities, invalidation and hot paths.
non_goals: Shadow-mode entries remain shadow and are not upgraded by this reference.

items.boundary: Global config merged with workspace-local non-sensitive overrides.
non_goals: Configuration loading does not prove every option is safe for enterprise policy.

items.surface: Provider proxy bind, auth and upstream configuration
items.boundary: Config-derived listener and provider upstream selection.
non_goals: No centralized fleet policy or remote configuration claim.

items.surface: Dashboard bind, host, base-path and auth configuration
items.boundary: CLI/config/environment precedence before local listener startup.
non_goals: No external identity-provider or enterprise RBAC claim.

items.surface: Self-hosted gateway generated config and secret environment
items.boundary: Gateway init renders compose, config and secret env for a local customer-managed instance.
non_goals: Generated local files are not a deployed customer environment.

items.boundary: Cloud API database, auth, mail and bind configuration loaded from environment.
non_goals: No committed production secret distribution or configuration certification.

items.boundary: Local language-to-LSP mapping and executable discovery.
non_goals: No centrally managed enterprise LSP fleet.

items.boundary: Download or source-build installation into the invoking user environment.
non_goals: Local installation is not customer deployment evidence.

items.boundary: Per-user daemon autostart on supported macOS and Linux hosts.
non_goals: No system-wide HA service management or Windows service deployment.

items.surface: Generated self-hosted gateway Docker Compose instance
items.boundary: Local compose definition for gateway and PostgreSQL generated by gateway init.
non_goals: Generation is not evidence that the compose stack was deployed or rolled back.

items.boundary: Multi-stage container recipe for the gateway-server feature.
non_goals: A Dockerfile is not a signed, deployed or health-checked image.

items.boundary: Multi-stage container recipe for the hosted cloud API binary.
non_goals: A Dockerfile is not production deployment or cloud CI evidence.

items.boundary: Offline verifier binds component, commit, contract, image, SBOM, config and migration references.
non_goals: Manifest verification is not deployment, promotion approval or rollback execution.

items.boundary: Required G0 evidence from an actually deployed and health-checked test environment.
non_goals: Hermetic local rehearsal must not be relabeled as actual deployment.

items.boundary: Target customer-managed Kubernetes packaging.
non_goals: Docker Compose is not represented as Kubernetes support.

items.boundary: Target reproducible infrastructure provisioning.
non_goals: Shell scripts and Dockerfiles are not represented as Terraform support.

items.boundary: Target offline bundle with pinned images, contracts, SBOM and verification material.
non_goals: Offline signature verification alone is not an air-gap deployment bundle.
